'''Cybloc''', also known as '''Cybloc Prime''', was a greenish [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Erg Es 992]] in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] there was a space station in orbit over the planet. [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] and his brother [[Savage Opress/Legends|Savage Opress]] broke into the space station and stole some credits. One of its [[Moon/Legends|moons]], [[Cybloc XII/Legends|Cybloc XII]], housed a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] trade base. However, the region was purged during the [[Death Seed]] incident.

{{Planet-stub}}
